data.title: Create generic KNOWN-ISSUES template at plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
data.description:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/docs/templates/` directory and `KNOWN-ISSUES.md` generic template with:
1. Search tips header (advising keyword search: CI, path, timeout, hook, config, deploy, test, flaky)
2. Index by category table with placeholder categories
3. Quick reference by incident ID table
4. At least 3 placeholder incidents following the format: `### INC-NNN: Title`, with Date, Keywords, Symptom, Root cause, Detection, Fix, Rule added (optional) fields
5. Adaptation guidance section explaining how to customize for a specific project
6. Incident entry format template block

Base the format on the existing `templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.example.md` but ensure it matches the incident format specified in the parent epic (ID, keywords, symptom, root cause, detection, fix).

The onboarding SKILL.md (line 1302) already references `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md` as the source path and copies it with an overwrite guard (line 1304). Creating this file completes the pipeline.

### TDD Requirement
Task 1's tests (`tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh`) serve as the RED tests. After creating the template, those tests turn GREEN.

### File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Template file exists at `plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md`
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- [ ] Template contains at least 3 placeholder incidents with `### INC-` heading format
  Verify: grep -c '^### INC-' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] Template contains incident format fields (Keywords, Symptom, Root cause, Detection, Fix)
  Verify: grep -q 'Keywords' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md && grep -q 'Symptom' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md && grep -q 'Root cause' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md && grep -q 'Detection' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md && grep -q 'Fix' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- [ ] Template contains adaptation guidance section
  Verify: grep -q 'Adaptation Guidance' plugins/dso/docs/templates/KNOWN-ISSUES.md
- [ ] Tests from Task 1 pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-known-issues-template.sh
